symbols.name: IGenericRepository
symbols.summary: Represents the base interface for all repository abstractions. Repositories serve as a bridge between the domain and data mapping layers, enabling a more abstract and decoupled approach to data access.

syntax.content: public interface IGenericRepository : IGenericReadOnlyRepository, IRepository where TEntity : class, IEntity
Task InsertAsync(TEntity entity, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)

parameters.description: The entity to insert.
A token to monitor for cancellation requests.

returns.description: A task representing the asynchronous operation, with the inserted entity.

parameters.description: The entity to insert.
A token to monitor for cancellation requests.

returns.description: A task representing the asynchronous operation, with the inserted entity.

symbols.name: UpdateSetAsync(Action>, IFindOptions, CancellationToken)
symbols.summary: Updates all entities in the repository by applying the specified property assignments in a set-based operation.

syntax.content: Task UpdateSetAsync(Action> set, IFindOptions options = null, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)

parameters.description: The builder action that defines which properties are updated and how their values are assigned.
Optional query options used to shape the update operation.
A token to monitor for cancellation requests.

returns.description: A task that represents the asynchronous operation. The task result contains the number of affected entities.

returns.description: A task that represents the asynchronous operation. The task result contains the number of affected entities.

symbols.name: UpdateSetAsync(ISpecification, Action>, IFindOptions, CancellationToken)

symbols.name: UpsertAsync(TEntity, CancellationToken)
symbols.summary: Insert or updates the provided entity.

syntax.content: Task UpsertAsync(TEntity entity, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)

parameters.description: The entity to insert or update.
Optional. A System.Threading.CancellationToken to observe while waiting for the task to complete.

returns.description: A System.Threading.Tasks.Task that represents the asynchronous operation, containing a tuple with the entity and the action result.
